CHEDULE = True\",\"old\":\"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False\",\"op\":\"replace_exact\",\"source\":\"\",\"text\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None:\\n        total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS\\n    else:\\n        total_steps = steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=max(1, total_steps))\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Enable a budget-aligned cosine schedule (using fixed-step horizon when present) and slightly increase Adam learning rate to improve progress within the constrained 256-step verifier budget.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"topk\"]}"}}
